enrichment.summary: Kyle shares a brief daily vlog from Boulder on January 9, 2017, recounting his sleep troubles from skipping a shower, his productive day working on a bike racer level page he feels close to finishing, and his excitement about starting a new history podcast on the fall of the Roman Empire.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Must be completely clean to sleep well — skipping a shower noticeably disrupted his rest
Excited and motivated; believes he can finish it in about a week
Enthusiastic about history as a new genre; wants to explore more historical podcasts and films

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-Log for January 9th, 2017.
Yesterday, I got just, oh yeah, was it yesterday that I got too tired?
I was working until like 8 and then I got too tired to go down to the clubhouse and take a shower.
So I jumped in bed and that was a bad idea because I didn't sleep right.
If I'm not perfectly clean, man, I don't sleep right. I have to be totally clean.
So yeah, I didn't make that mistake today. I just got back from the shower.
It's 6.42 in the morning now.
I got up at like 1 or something or 2. I think it was 2.
And then, yeah, I was just working all day long. I was printing and doing photos.
But mainly, my bike racer level page, I was looking at fixing stuff on that all day long.
And it's all just totally easy and going by really fast.
I remember when I abandoned it, knowing that I didn't have that much longer to go and I feel like that.
I feel like I can, I'm actually fired up to go at least a week on it because I feel like I could finish it in just maybe a week.
So, yeah, it's super exciting.
And it's, yeah, it's the appropriate time to do it. I should work on it.
Yeah, it definitely deserves the whole week.
So, yeah, I'll probably go to sleep pretty soon.
I was listening to, oh, I got started on a new podcast.
History, the fall of Roman Empire.
And it's not that long until I got like 10 episodes.
Yeah, I want to do all of the different historical podcasts.
It's a new genre for me.
And, yeah, and I noticed there's a lot of cool historical movies too, so I want to watch those.
It's a, I feel like Christmas, all this new stuff for me.
Um, so, um, I'm really high right now.
Just got really high.
But I don't have anything else to say.
So, peace out.
